response.justification: The candidate has a strong individual contributor background spanning 15+ years with genuine developer tooling exposure (CI/CD infrastructure, test frameworks, MCP tooling), but the resume contains zero evidence of people management, team leadership, performance management, or organizational change — all of which are core requirements for this explicitly people-leadership-focused Level II Manager role. Every position held is an IC or founding role with no indication of direct reports, hiring, or strategic roadmap ownership at an org level.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software development experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Relevant developer tooling work including CI/CD setup, open-source test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Consistent community engagement through workshops, conference talks, and open-source contributions demonstrating knowledge-sharing aptitude
concerns: No people management experience anywhere on the resume — no mention of direct reports, performance reviews, hiring, or team development
No evidence of strategic roadmap planning, organizational change leadership, or cross-team alignment at a management level
Mobile-platform depth is thin — one brief iOS/Apple TV stint at WatchUp — insufficient for a role centered on a major mobile platform ecosystem
